variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "Logistics Corp" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "Logistics Corp" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Cargo Tracking Dashboard
## Logistics Corp | Cargo Tracking Journey | Business Observability
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: Cargo On Time Delivery Rate
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.on_time_delivery_rate)

4.title: Cargo Delayed Rate
4.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.delayed_cargo_rate)

5.title: Order Fulfillment Success Rate
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), success = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(success)/toDouble(total))*100, decimals:2)

7.title: Average Order Transit Time
7.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries value = avg(additionalfields.order_transit_time), bins:30

8.title: Cargo Tracking Errors by Region
8.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.error_by_region) | summarize count = count(), by: {additionalfields.error_by_region} | sort count desc | limit 10

9.title: Cargo Volume by Month
9.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries count = count(), bins:30

10.title: Order Cancellation Rate by Day of Week
10.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = count()

11.content:
---
🤖 *Dashboard generated by Bespoke Ollama (7 unique tiles) | 2026-03-18 | 11 tiles*
